title: Confetti on Status column
excerpt: So I added a status column but am using it for “categories”. How do I get rid of the confetti that appears in one of my labels. It does not have the green color of “done” in status and the label is different.

posts.author: nancibee (NancyBaunis)
posts.cookedHtml: So I added a status column but am using it for “categories”. How do I get rid of the confetti that appears in one of my labels. It does not have the green color of “done” in status and the label is different.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nancibee

Welcome to the Community!

Not to worry, you can turn these animations off easily.

To do this, first select your initials or profile picture in the bottom left hand corner.
Then select monday.labs from the menu that appears.
This will launch a pop up with beta features that you can activate for your account.

Activate the ‘Hide Done Animations’ to turn the confetti off when marking an item as Done.

image1538×202 22 KB

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
